title: tricuspis cornuta
intro: Tricuspis cornuta, also known as the horned poppy, is a plant species native to various parts of the world, particularly in Asia and the Mediterranean. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Tricuspis cornuta include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation, making it a popular natural remedy for stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
